Backend Vulkan zamiast ROCm — szersza ko: Vulkan backend instead of ROCm — wider compatibility with AMD cards without full ROCm support (e.g. BC-250).
brak danych (demon jeszcze nie zapisał s: no data (the daemon hasn't written a status yet)
Brak dostępnych modeli (hosty nieosiągal: No models available (hosts unreachable or nothing selected in LLM).
Brak hostów — dodaj je w zakładce: No hosts — add them in the
Brak zainstalowanych modeli (albo host n: No installed models (or the host is unreachable).
Demon jeszcze nie zapisał status.json na: The daemon hasn't written status.json on this host yet.
Domyślnie Ollama nasłuchuje tylko lokaln: By default Ollama only listens locally (127.0.0.1). Check this to make it reachable from other devices on the network (e.g. BC-250 as a client).
Gotowy config.yaml do ręcznego wklejenia: Ready-made config.yaml to paste manually into ~/.continue/config.yaml, built from the models exposed above.
Host nieosiągalny albo bez zainstalowany: Host unreachable or has no installed models.
Ile modeli może być jednocześnie załadow: How many models can be loaded into memory at once (default: 3x the number of GPUs).
Ile równoległych zapytań obsłuży jeden z: How many parallel requests a single loaded model will handle at once.
Jak długo model zostaje w pamięci po ost: How long a model stays in memory after the last request (default: a few minutes). E.g. 30m, 1h, -1 (always), 0 (immediately).
Każda zmiana zapisuje override systemd i: Every change writes a systemd override and restarts the service (loaded models will briefly disappear from memory). An empty field = Ollama's default behavior.
Każdy model dostaje domyślnie role: chat: Every model gets the default roles: chat, edit, apply. Other roles are also available to edit manually in the text below: autocomplete (editor suggestions), embed (embedding models, e.g. nomic-embed-text — used for RAG), rerank (search/ranking results). A model that isn't meant for chat/code editing should have its
Kwantyzacja pamięci podręcznej kontekstu: Context cache quantization — q8_0 is about -50% VRAM usage at a negligible quality cost.
LiteLLM did not respond within 60 s. Service log: journalctl --user -u litellm -e
roles swapped for the right one from this list.
nadpisując go całkowicie, albo scalając: overwriting it completely, or merging manually with existing content if you already have other models there). The panel never writes this file automatically — click into the field below and select all (Ctrl+A / Cmd+A) to copy.
Nazwa hosta może zawierać tylko litery,: The host name may only contain letters, digits and hyphens.
Nazwa '{nazwa}' jest zarezerwowana dla t: The name '{nazwa}' is reserved for this host.
Nie udało się zapisać żądania zasilania: Failed to save the power request for host {nazwa}: {blad}
Odznacz, żeby wymusić pominięcie zintegr: Uncheck to force skipping the integrated GPU (e.g. for issues on a unified CPU+GPU architecture like BC-250).
Po dodaniu pobierz instalator i uruchom: After adding, download the installer and run it ON the target machine (e.g. over SSH):
Podpięte pod LiteLLM (nie pod pojedynczy: Wired to LiteLLM (not to a single host) — it sees exactly the models selected in the
Rozmiar okna kontekstu w tokenach (domyś: Context window size in tokens (default 4096 — too little for agentic work in Continue/OpenCode).
Skrypt instaluje Ollamę, montuje stan pr: The script installs Ollama, mounts the state directory over NFS from this host, and sets up octollama-daemon. It requires an NFS export already configured on this host (see README.md, "Multi-host") — this isn't yet automated from this panel.
Sprawdź listę i wybór modeli w zakładce: Check the model list and selection in the
uv zainstalowane, ale binarki nie znalez: uv installed, but the binary was not found in ~/.local/bin
WebUI did not respond within 3 minutes. Service log: journalctl --user -u open-webui -e
Zaznacz, które modele na których hostach: Check which models on which hosts should be visible through LiteLLM. Saving the selection immediately restarts the running service with the new config.
tab, from all hosts at once.
Zezwól na dostęp spoza komputera — 0.0.0: Allow access from outside this computer — 0.0.0.0 (OLLAMA_HOST)
Zmniejsza zużycie pamięci przy dłuższym: Reduces memory usage with longer context, if the model and hardware support it.
This host has no MAC address set.
Wake-on-LAN wymaga adresu MAC i musi być: Wake-on-LAN needs a MAC address and must be enabled in the target machine's BIOS/UEFI. Power off/suspend/restart is a request written to that host's state.json - its local daemon carries it out, so it may take a moment to apply.
Nie udało się wykryć adresu MAC — host m: Could not detect the MAC address — the host must be responding on the network right now.
puste = spróbuj wykryć automatycznie (ho: leave empty to try auto-detecting (host must be responding now)
Te modele są wystawione na więcej niż je: These models are exposed on more than one host at once — LiteLLM automatically spreads traffic between them.
Żaden wystawiony model nie występuje obe: None of the exposed models currently run on more than one host.
Zapis ustawień od razu restartuje działa: Saving the settings immediately restarts the running LiteLLM service with the new config — same as the model selection above.
Czas wychłodzenia hosta po błędzie (seku: Host cooldown time after an error (seconds)
Dozwolone błędy przed wychłodzeniem host: Allowed failures before a host is cooled down
Niższa liczba = wyższy priorytet. Zostaw: Lower number = higher priority. Leave blank for pure load balancing with no preferred host.
Gdy zapytanie do danego modelu się nie p: When a request to a given model fails, LiteLLM will try the backup model set here.
Włącz fallback przy przekroczeniu okna k: Enable fallback on context window overflow
Gdy zapytanie przekroczy okno kontekstu: When a request exceeds a small model's context window, LiteLLM will automatically try the larger model set here.
Zaznacz i zapisz przynajmniej jeden mode: Select and save at least one model above to configure fallbacks.
Losowy wybór hosta przy każdym zapytaniu: Random host choice on every request (simplest, default).
Wybiera host, który aktualnie przetwarza: Picks the host currently processing the fewest requests.
Wybiera host o najniższym zmierzonym opó: Picks the host with the lowest measured response latency.
Uwzględnia limity zużycia (tokeny/zapyta: Takes usage limits (tokens/requests per minute) into account when choosing a host.
Nieprawidłowa wartość pola „{pole}” — wy: Invalid value for field “{pole}” — a positive whole number is required.
Priorytet musi być liczbą całkowitą doda: Priority must be a positive whole number ({model} / {host}).
Zapisano ustawienia routingu i zrestarto: Routing settings saved and the LiteLLM service was restarted.
Zapisano ustawienia routingu. Zostaną za: Routing settings saved. They will be applied when the LiteLLM service starts.
Wygenerowany config LiteLLM jest niepopr: The generated LiteLLM config is not valid YAML: {blad}
Do czego ma służyć dany model w Continue: What a given model should be used for in Continue — chat, agent with tools, editor autocomplete, embedding for RAG... We suggest a default based on the capabilities Ollama itself reports (shown next to the model); saving immediately updates the generated Continue config, no LiteLLM restart needed.
Zaznacz i zapisz przynajmniej jeden mode: Select and save at least one model above to assign it roles.
Podpowiedzi inline w edytorze (wymaga ws: Inline suggestions in the editor (requires FIM/insert support from the model).
Edycja zaznaczonego fragmentu kodu polec: Editing a selected code snippet via a command.
Nakładanie zaproponowanych przez czat zm: Applying changes proposed by the chat to a file.
Model embeddingowy używany w RAG (przesz: An embedding model used in RAG (context retrieval) - not for conversation.
Zapisano role modeli dla configu Continu: Model roles saved for the Continue config.
Role każdego modelu (chat, edit, apply,: Each model's roles (chat, edit, apply, autocomplete, embed, rerank) are set in the “Model roles in Continue.dev” section above on this tab — suggested by default from the capabilities Ollama reports, and can be overridden there without hand-editing this file.
